title: Best Of Brighton Comedy
description: The Best of Brighton Comedy showcases some of the brightest and best comedians on the Brighton comedy circuit. These are regular performers at The Branding Needs Work, a weekly new material gig held all through the year at The Caxton Arms. We think you should see what their hard work has created, and we know it will be an absolute treat!

reviews.reviewer: By The Reviews Hub - Brighton May 14, 2026 Updated: May 14, 2026 No Comments 2 M
reviews.rating_raw: The Reviews Hub Star Rating 90 % 90% Real, Raw, Passion 9
reviews.excerpt: Writer: Alice EllaDirector: Veronica von Beaverhausen Fringe theatre is well known as testing ground for new work, and disability advocate Alice Ella has done just that with her new show Chronically Sick, Hormonal Slag. In this 90-minute solo show, Ella explores her own self-described ‘hormonal hellscape’ health challenges.
